steps.title: Show the method-result link
steps.content: The first sentence explains that Bell and Carver adapted the pseudonym practice by publishing together under the shared name Charles Vale. The next sentence states what that method allowed them to do.

steps.title: Reject wrong transitions
steps.content: Choice B introduces an example, but the sentence gives a result. Choice C signals time order, which is not the relationship. Choice D signals contrast, but the second sentence continues the same idea. The answer is A.
